title: MorningBrief
description: Per-day morning-market-monitor brief. The durable record emitted once per morning (cron 09:00 Istanbul / 06:00 UTC). This JSON is the SPINE: ingestion->anomaly->brief all write into it; render reads it. Versioned by schema_version so historical archive entries stay parseable.

schema_version.description: Semantic version of THIS schema. Bump on any breaking field change so archived briefs remain readable.

date.description: Logical morning date in Istanbul, YYYY-MM-DD. Filename key for archive/<date>.html and data/<date>.json.

run_ts_utc.description: Actual UTC timestamp the run executed (ISO 8601).

config_hash.description: Short hash (e.g. sha256[:12]) of the resolved config.yaml used for this run. Lets a reader know which disputed-knob settings produced this brief.

vol_model.description: Resolved vol_model knob for this run (echoed from config for provenance).

calm_morning.description: Calibration self-check: true if the run surfaced <=1 Red. If false on a known-calm day, thresholds are too loose (reference rec-2).

degraded_sources.description: Source keys that failed/were stale this run (graceful degradation log). Empty = clean run.

composites.description: The 'one-number' system-temperature anchors. The anomaly test runs FIRST on these (detect-on-composites). Any composite may be null if its source was unavailable.

tiles.description: One entry per CORE tile (~15, spanning axes 0-12). The orientation layer. Each tile is enriched by the anomaly engine with z/percentile/color/staleness.

cards.description: <=3 attention cards (a crisis banner may add a 4th flagged is_banner). Every card MUST carry a populated why_now, else it is suppressed upstream (decorative-noise rule).

calendar.description: Today's scheduled releases, ranked by cross-asset transmission power.

plumbing_flags.description: Funding-plumbing axis flags (SRF rising off 0, SOFR-IORB>25bp, EFFR top-of-range, net-liq 5d drop). The most-omitted axis; front-screened.

corr_breaks.description: Correlation-break dislocations expressed as structural-relationship residual outliers (NOT rolling-corr). Require 3-day persistence.

dog_didnt_bark.description: 'The dog that didn't bark' — on scheduled-event days, realized move < ~0.5x expected (priced-in / coiled spring). The low tail of the conditional residual.

level_pct.description: Level percentile of value over the configured window (state vs shock).

change_score.description: EWMA-standardized change-score of the composite (z of its first-difference). The detect-on-composites test statistic.

key.description: Stable tile identifier, e.g. 'ust_2y', 'hy_oas', 'vix'. Matches config tile key and the RawSeries key from ingestion.

axis.description: Orthogonal axis index 0-12 (0 composite anchor .. 12 crypto).

value.description: Latest level/price. null if source failed (tile then flagged stale/missing).

change.description: Today's transformed change (log-return for prices, first-difference for yields/spreads).

transform.description: Which transform produced 'change'. 'level'/'sign' = no z computed (e.g. curve sign-change is the signal).

ewma_z.description: Magnitude: change / EWMA-sigma (lambda=0.94). null when transform in {level,sign} or source missing.

pct_1y.description: Empirical percentile of the standardized move over the 1y window.

pct_3y.description: Empirical percentile of the standardized move over the 3y window.

level_pct_756.description: Level percentile over 756 trading days (~3y) — state context, e.g. 'HY OAS at 95th pct'.

robust_z.description: Robust z = 0.6745*(x-median)/MAD (Iglewicz-Hoaglin) for spiky series; flag |z|>3.5.

is_front_screen.description: True if tile belongs to the 60-second front-screen set (config-driven).

note.description: Optional construct/label note, e.g. 'net-liq is a construct, not a Fed metric'.

title.description: Short headline, e.g. 'HY credit gapping wider'.

metric.description: The abnormal metric and its tile, e.g. 'HY OAS +18bp (BAMLH0A0HYM2)'.

score_desc.description: Plain-language score, e.g. '3.2-sigma move, 98th pct of 3y'.

is_banner.description: True if this is a crisis banner (allowed to exceed the 3-card cap).

tile_keys.description: Tile keys backing this card (>=2 orthogonal for corroboration).

why_now.description: MANDATORY. A card without a populated why_now is suppressed upstream.

calendar_event.description: Related scheduled event today, or null if none (unscheduled shock).

cross_asset_confirm_or_contradict.description: Cross-asset corroboration or contradiction, e.g. 'confirmed by VIX backwardation + USD bid' or 'contradicted by calm equities'.

time.description: Release time, ISO 8601 or 'HH:MM TZ'. null if all-day/unknown.

consensus.description: Consensus estimate (number or formatted string). null if no consensus.

prior_citi_surprise.description: Prior Citi Economic Surprise Index reading (normalized surprise), or null if unavailable.

value.description: Current numeric reading driving the flag.

triggered.description: Whether the flag's threshold is breached this morning.

residual_z.description: Today's residual as a vol-adjusted z / EWMA-sigma multiple.

persistence_days.description: Consecutive days the residual has been an outlier (need >=3 to flag a regime break).

triggered.description: True if residual_z outlier AND persistence>=3 (or a weighted sign-flip).

sign_flip.description: True if this is a correlation sign-flip (weighted heavily, e.g. stock-bond corr turning positive).

tile_key.description: Tile whose move was suppressed, e.g. 'spx'.

event.description: The scheduled event a move was expected around, e.g. 'US CPI'.

expected_move.description: Straddle-implied or 3y event-day historical expected standardized move.

triggered.description: True if ratio < threshold (priced-in / coiled spring).

color.description: Tile/card status color. gray = stale/missing (graceful degradation). red = flagged anomaly that passed FDR + corroboration.

staleness.description: Mandatory freshness badge on every tile/composite/flag.

asof.description: Date the underlying datapoint is as-of (YYYY-MM-DD). null if missing.

lag_desc.description: Human lag descriptor, e.g. 'OFR 2-bd lag', 'NFCI weekly', 'copper monthly', 'EOD delayed'.

is_stale.description: True if asof is older than the tile's expected freshness window (data did not refresh as expected).

history.description: Recent datapoints for the inline-SVG sparkline, oldest->newest. Render computes the SVG from these at render time.
